tool.name: response_diff
tool.description: Compare HTTP responses to detect subtle differences.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect behavioral changes in responses - Identify WAF bypasses by comparing responses - Find security issues through response analysis - Calculate similarity between responses - Identify specific changes between responses

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The comparison action: - compare: Full comparison with statistics - diff_text: Generate unified diff output - analyze_similarity: Calculate similarity metrics - find_changes: Identify specific changes

parameter.name: response2
parameter.description: Second HTTP response body. Required for comparison actions.

parameter.name: normalize
parameter.description: Whether to normalize dynamic values before comparison (default: true)

parameter.name: ignore_patterns
parameter.description: Additional regex patterns to ignore during comparison

parameter.name: context_lines
parameter.description: Number of context lines in diff output (default: 3)

returns.description: Comparison results including differences, similarity scores, and analysis

tool.examples:
# Full comparison
compare {"status": "success", "user": "admin"} {"status": "error", "user": "admin"}
# Generate diff text
diff_text Response 1 content Response 2 content
# Analyze similarity
analyze_similarity Response 1 Response 2
# Find specific changes
find_changes Response 1 Response 2
